methods.description: Process for preparing pollen samples for light microscopy to study their characteristics such as shape, color, exine ornamentations, and type of apertures.

steps.description: Pollen materials were separated from their anthers with the help of forceps and needle under a dissecting microscope.
steps.searchable_summary: separate pollen materials from anthers using forceps and needle under a dissecting microscope

steps.description: The pollen grains ready for microscopic observations by acetolysis method and were placed on slide.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare pollen grains for microscopy using acetolysis method and place on slide

steps.description: The measurements were based on 15-20 readings for every specimen.
steps.searchable_summary: take 15-20 measurements of each pollen specimen

methods.description: Method for collecting plants in flowering condition and identifying them using floras for preparing pollen grain slides.

steps.description: Regular field tours were arranged to collect the plants in flowering condition for preparing pollen grain slides.
steps.searchable_summary: arrange field tours to collect flowering plants

steps.description: Collected plants from the fields were identified with the help of floras.

methods.description: Procedure for mounting pollen grains on slides and observing them under various microscopes to identify them using published literature.

steps.description: Pollen grains mounted & observed under microscope, light microscope, research trinocular & binocular microscopes.
steps.searchable_summary: mount pollen grains and observe under various microscopes

steps.description: Pollen grains were identified with the help of some published literature.
steps.searchable_summary: identify pollen grains using published literature
